name: Jerry Reed's Sweet Potato Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and boil them until they are soft.
2. Drain the boiled potatoes.
3. Add the margarine, sugar, and nutmeg to the drained potatoes and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared 9-inch pie shell.
5. Serve one 9-inch pie, topped with whipped cream or pecans.
